hero.title:
Light the Way
Unstoppable
hero.subtitle:
Yiwu Eagle Flash Lighting Technology · 100+ Professional Flashlights
From outdoor adventures to industrial use, we have the right light for you

features.f1_desc: Eagle Flash flagship series features the latest LED chips, delivering up to 3000 lumens with an effective range of over 1000 meters. Perfect for night hiking, mining, or outdoor search and rescue.
features.f2_title:
Aircraft-Grade Aluminum
IPX8 Deep Water Protection
features.f2_desc: Crafted from 6061-T6 aircraft-grade aluminum with anodized finish for superior corrosion and impact resistance. IPX8 waterproof rating allows operation at 100 meters underwater, designed for professional divers.
features.f3_desc: From pocket-sized pen lights to tactical flashlights, UV inspection lights to diving lights, children's night lights to COB work lights — we cover every use case imaginable.
